channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: What is the 'tarps off' trend that men are engaging in? Find out in the quiz
item.description: Plus: The L.A. mayoral race, AI court battles, extinct animals and Eurovision!
item.content:encoded: Plus: The L.A. mayoral race, AI court battles, extinct animals and Eurovision!
item.dc:creator: Holly J. Morris

item.title: 'We'll never know if he could have been saved.' The gaps in Trump's rural health fund
item.description: Republicans promise that $50 billion in new health funding will help rural America. But it's not expected to aid the years-long effort in North Carolina's Martin County to reopen its only hospital.
item.content:encoded:
Republicans promise that $50 billion in new health funding will help rural America. But it's not expected to aid the years-long effort in North Carolina's Martin County to reopen its only hospital.

(Image credit: Sarah Jane Tribble)
item.dc:creator: Sarah Jane Tribble

item.title: As voters prioritize cost of living, focus on abortion evolves in midterm elections
item.description: There's been a shift in attention in the party ahead of the midterms as voters rank affordability the top issue. That raises questions about what an evolving message on reproductive rights looks like.
item.content:encoded:
There's been a shift in attention in the party ahead of the midterms as voters rank affordability the top issue. That raises questions about what an evolving message on reproductive rights looks like.

(Image credit: Amanda Andrade-Rhoades)
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore

item.title: A stranger's compliment helped her feel confident after chemo
item.description: When Pat Gentile began to grow out her hair after chemotherapy, she was nervous to go to work for the first time without a wig. An unexpected encounter with a convenience store stranger changed that.
item.content:encoded: When Pat Gentile began to grow out her hair after chemotherapy, she was nervous to go to work for the first time without a wig. An unexpected encounter with a convenience store stranger changed that.
item.dc:creator: Laura Kwerel

item.title: Stephen Colbert's 'Late Show' ends with a swan song and a giant wormhole
item.description: With a dash of sci-fi, Colbert ended his CBS late-night show with a powerful musical sendoff featuring Paul McCartney, Elvis Costello and Jon Batiste.
item.content:encoded:
Late Show finale.'/>

With a dash of sci-fi, Colbert ended his CBS late-night show with a powerful musical sendoff featuring Paul McCartney, Elvis Costello and Jon Batiste.

(Image credit: Scott Kowalchyk)
item.dc:creator: Mandalit del Barco

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Senate breaks for recess, delaying vote on ICE funding, DNC releases 'autopsy' of 2024 presidential election, a look at Trump's political -- and personal -- interest in Cuba.
item.content:encoded: Senate breaks for recess, delaying vote on ICE funding, DNC releases 'autopsy' of 2024 presidential election, a look at Trump's political -- and personal -- interest in Cuba.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: UN gravely concerned by an Afghan Taliban law that has provisions on child marriage
item.description: The United Nations expressed "grave concern" on Thursday about a new law issued by Afghanistan's Taliban government on separation in marriage which includes provisions on child marriage.
item.content:encoded:
The United Nations expressed "grave concern" on Thursday about a new law issued by Afghanistan's Taliban government on separation in marriage which includes provisions on child marriage.

(Image credit: Dar Yasin)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Trump says he's sending 5,000 more troops to Poland
item.description: President Trump's announcement stirred confusion in Europe following weeks of changing statements from his administration about reducing the American military footprint in Europe.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump's announcement stirred confusion in Europe following weeks of changing statements from his administration about reducing the American military footprint in Europe.

(Image credit: Jacquelyn Martin)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Republicans call off vote on Iran war resolution that was on the verge of passing
item.description: Republicans struggled Thursday to find the votes to dismiss legislation that would compel President Donald Trump to withdraw from the war with Iran, delaying planned votes on the matter into June.
item.content:encoded:
Republicans struggled Thursday to find the votes to dismiss legislation that would compel President Donald Trump to withdraw from the war with Iran, delaying planned votes on the matter into June.

(Image credit: Mariam Zuhaib)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: Rubio doubtful of diplomacy with Cuba as Trump raises new threat of military action
item.description: President Donald Trump and America's top diplomat on Thursday again raised the specter of U.S. military intervention in Cuba, a day after the administration announced criminal charges against the island's former leader, Raúl Castro.
item.content:encoded:
President Donald Trump and America's top diplomat on Thursday again raised the specter of U.S. military intervention in Cuba, a day after the administration announced criminal charges against the island's former leader, Raúl Castro.

(Image credit: Stefano Rellandini)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press
